steps.t: The Uruk-hideout is south-west of Caddabrand's camp, beyond the entrance to the wolf-den. Caddabrand has tracked the Uruk, Zúrsnaga, to a cave south-w…
Caddabrand's camp lies east of the Uruk-hai hideout and the wolf-den. Caddabrand will be eager to hear the news that Zúrsnaga has been defeated.
